name: Everlasting Alloy
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>不</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>朽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>特</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>殊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゅ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>金</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
If you control "Jinzo": Activate 1 of these effects;
● All Machine monsters you currently control cannot be destroyed by your opponent's card effects, until the end of this turn.
● When a card or effect is activated that targets a Machine monster(s) you control: Negate that effect.

action: Activates if targeted by card effect
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
Negates the effects of Spell Cards
Negates the effects of Trap Cards
